name: Slipped on coworkers spill at work, who pays?

mainEntity.name: Slipped on coworkers spill at work, who pays?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Your employer's workers' comp covers it; sue coworker only if gross negligence (rare).** Work-related hazards fall under comp.[1] Key factors: (1) No subrogation usually; (2) Third-party if vendor spill; (3) Fault irrelevant. Report fully. Attorney checks extras.
